title: Northland Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Northland, NZ, including discounts on activities, campervan hire, and travel insurance, with prices from $200-380/day for a family of 4
intro: Northland is a subtropical paradise perfect for family holidays, with Cape Reinga, Ninety Mile Beach, and ancient kauri forests to explore. With a budget of $200-380/day for a family of 4, you can enjoy a range of activities and accommodation options. From July 2026, take advantage of current booking deals and discounts to make your trip even more affordable.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in Northland, including the Bay of Islands. Discover Cars has family campervans from $89/day, while Booking.com provides free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings. Cover-More also offers comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day.

These deals can help you save money on your Northland family holiday. For example, a family of 4 can book a campervan for $89/day and enjoy free cancellation on their accommodation booking.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on holiday park and motel bookings with Booking.com
Comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities in Northland
sections.body:
Northland offers a range of activities suitable for families with children aged 4+. Some of the best-value activities include visiting the Cape Reinga Lighthouse, sandboarding on Ninety Mile Beach, and exploring the Kauri Museum in Matakohe.

The Waitangi Treaty Grounds and Hokianga Harbour dunes are also must-visit attractions. For free activities, take a 30-min return walk on the Cape Reinga walkway, drive along Ninety Mile Beach (4WD only at most points), or enjoy the Mangawhai Heads beach walk and estuary.
list: Cape Reinga Lighthouse visit: $20-$30 per person
Ninety Mile Beach sandboarding: $20-$30 per person

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body: To make your Northland family holiday even more affordable, consider the following money-saving tips:
list: Book your activities and accommodation in advance to take advantage of early bird discounts
Pack your own food and snacks to avoid eating out for every meal
Choose free activities like walking on the Cape Reinga walkway or driving along Ninety Mile Beach
Consider hiring a campervan instead of booking multiple hotel rooms
Look for package deals that include accommodation and activities
Use travel insurance to protect against unexpected trip cancellations or interruptions

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices for your Northland family holiday, book your activities and accommodation outside of peak season (December to February). Consider visiting in the shoulder season (April to May or September to November) for lower prices and fewer crowds.

Bookme.co.nz and Discover Cars often offer discounts and promotions for early bookings, so be sure to check their websites regularly for deals.
